title: TODO: short title
description: The api-gateway binary has crashed and left a core dump. The crash cause is pending analysis. The report must be updated to analysis=completed after identifying the crash reason, and the service state set to stable.
hint_1: read /opt/winlab/real-server/coredump.report to see the analysis state
hint_2: analyse the core dump with gdb
hint_3: Run gdb on the core dump, identify the crashing frame, fix the root cause, and restart the service
